{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321141214D911F6C3B0542A09C8CF"}"},"total":2011},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7187199719419118396","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书非常的好，尤其是看到沈洲卧底归来的时候真的特别心疼，在极度危险的地方，坚持了十年，回来之后却遭到了不停的问话但是结局是好的，在此致敬我们所有的缉毒警察，敬礼！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673400438,"group_id":"7130917568805604359","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"撑伞也是雨中人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/vXrcl2kgfcVjx7ILRrNXoqGqM22kLbSyTZVURq2/Zs","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b9ebe45920f74067be5ddfd7ac8718d3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615431&x-signature=IDqElaU7%2B9LZBBoMq04PHp5jFEE%3D","user_id":"4178604989352483","user_name":"两瓶雪碧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4178604989352483","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7130917568805604359","book_info":{"abstract":"【非正经传统系统文（存在感低而且可能是个假系统……）+悬疑破案（伪）+单女主+双向奔赴+非传统狗粮＋剧情慢热＋保甜甜甜甜】
【这是狗粮文!这是狗粮文!这是狗粮文!重要的事情说三遍!】
【老规矩，第四章案件开始，简介无能（其实开头也很无能哈哈哈），请看完50章，不喜欢你可以给我寄刀片了~】
【注意！本文不是无脑爽文也不是无敌文！系统存在感不强！看文稍微需要点思考！】

沈洲十年卧底归来，原本想着跑到江海刑侦队做个小警员养老。
谁知刚入职第一个网红虐杀案被他查出了新型毒品。
一家三口自杀案被他顺藤摸瓜掀了一个毒村。
就连出去徒步都能顺手破个凶杀案。
“沈洲，你多少有点柯南体质！”
这世界上有阳光的地方就有阴影，沈洲本就从阴影中走来，现在他想做的是把阳光带到更多的地方。
——
午后的阳光正好
司淼淼：“沈洲你被逮捕了。”
沈洲：“？？？这次我又犯什么事了？”
“芳心纵火犯。”司淼淼抱着他的脖子低声说，“你要对我负责！”
沈洲亲了亲她的嘴角，“好，我负责。负责一辈子。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f6b6963098548ab10141d8331a4911f8","author":"麻辣兔头加点糖","author_id":"","book_id":"7130917568805604359","book_name":"卧底归来，第一次破案震惊全局","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7130918591788122662","read_count":"12463","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"754223"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"361","tags":"悬疑灵异,推理,系统,单女主,破案,1v1,无后宫,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f75ec60ab23b1613a3cac840a48597dd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257534&x-signature=x%2BEBxtIb5gCTqYMSaGrJZJJ%2BRKM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1503729407766584","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_ite
